name: Country Captain Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a large skillet that can hold the chicken in one layer.
2. Add onion, sweet pepper, and garlic; cook until tender for about 5 minutes.
3. Transfer vegetables to a saucepan.
4. Add oil to the skillet. In a bowl, combine flour, salt, pepper, curry powder, shredded coconut, and raisins.
5. Coat chicken pieces in the flour mixture.
6. Cook chicken in hot oil until nicely browned; drain excess oil.
7. Add tomatoes, their liquid, and chicken stock to the saucepan with vegetables.
8. Bring to a boil over medium heat.
9. Pour the sauce over the chicken; simmer for 15 minutes.
10. Stir in coconut and raisins; continue simmering for another 5 minutes.
11. Test chicken for doneness and adjust seasoning as needed.
12. Arrange chicken in a serving bowl.
13. Garnish with toasted almonds and chopped parsley.
14. Serve with boiled rice.
